_comment: IN-BUNDLE manifest. Lives at the root of hxcheckout-1.0.0.hxapp (a zip) and is validated by case_service.marketplace.checksum.parse_and_validate_manifest at download + promotion time. A module .hxapp carries NO executable backend code — the HxCheckout Python ships in the Velaris image (the trust model forbids loading in-process code from a package); the checkout_* tables ship on the normal migration track. Install only flips the in-image routes (/api/v1/checkout) + Studio module on per tenant via marketplace_installs.
name: HxCheckout
description: Commerce integration layer — turns external baskets into Velaris Order cases.
